name: Boon of Recovery
description: Increase one ability score of your choice by 1, to a maximum of 30. When you would be reduced to 0 hit points, you can drop to 1 hit point instead and regain hit points equal to half your hit point maximum (once per long rest). You also have a pool of ten d10s that you can expend as a bonus action to regain hit points, regaining all dice on a long rest.
